name: Exotic Chinese Fruit Bowl B1
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the fruit for eating by cutting into bite-size pieces.
2. Place the finely crushed ice in a shallow fruit bowl.
3. Pack and invert the fruit onto a colorful platter or silver tray.
4. Carefully make indentations in the ice with your finger.
5. Insert a toothpick into each piece of fruit and set it in the corresponding indentation.
6. Serve immediately at COLD temperature.
Effort: EASY
Time: 15 minutes
